identity.descriptionZh: Vercel 的 Design.md 主题展示，围绕开发工具、媒体内容、SaaS 产品、浅色界面组织页面。
identity.descriptionEn: Frontend deployment. Black and white precision, Geist font.

display.description: Vercel 的 Design.md 主题展示，围绕开发工具、媒体内容、SaaS 产品、浅色界面组织页面。
display.descriptionEn: Frontend deployment. Black and white precision, Geist font.

shadows.label: 阴影 1 - Shadow 1
shadows.description: Surfaces use a four-step ladder: `{colors.canvas}` (pure white for cards), `{colors.canvas-soft}` 98% (the page body), `{colors.canvas-soft-2}` 95% (occasional inset region), `{colors.primary}` (the deep ink-near-black used as the polarity-flipped band when a section needs the dark mode treatment). Shadows are exceptionally subtle — every elevated card carries a stacked shadow built from `0px 1px 1px #00000005` + `0px 2px 2px #0000000a` + an inset border. Cards never float on heavy drop-shadow; they sit on the page held by hairline + soft glow.

shadows.label: 阴影 2 - Shadow 2
shadows.description: Surfaces use a four-step ladder: `{colors.canvas}` (pure white for cards), `{colors.canvas-soft}` 98% (the page body), `{colors.canvas-soft-2}` 95% (occasional inset region), `{colors.primary}` (the deep ink-near-black used as the polarity-flipped band when a section needs the dark mode treatment). Shadows are exceptionally subtle — every elevated card carries a stacked shadow built from `0px 1px 1px #00000005` + `0px 2px 2px #0000000a` + an inset border. Cards never float on heavy drop-shadow; they sit on the page held by hairline + soft glow.

shadows.label: 阴影 3 - Shadow 3
shadows.description: | Level 3 — Soft Stack | `0px 2px 2px #0000000a, 0px 8px 8px -8px #0000000a` plus inset hairline. | The "medium" elevation — feature-grid cards. |

shadows.label: 阴影 4 - Shadow 4
shadows.description: | Level 4 — Float Stack | `0px 2px 2px #0000000a, 0px 8px 16px -4px #0000000a` plus inset hairline. | "Large" elevation — pricing cards, callout panels. |

borders.label: 边框 3 - Border 3
borders.description: | Level 1 — Inset Hairline | `0 0 0 1px #00000014` inset 1 px border. | Default card chrome — the brand's universal "you can see this card" cue. |

borders.label: 边框 4 - Border 4
borders.description: Background `{colors.canvas}`, text `{colors.ink}`, 1 px solid `{colors.hairline}` border (extracted as `0px solid rgb(235, 235, 235)`), same typography / height / shape.

borders.label: 边框 5 - Border 5
borders.description: Surfaces use a four-step ladder: `{colors.canvas}` (pure white for cards), `{colors.canvas-soft}` 98% (the page body), `{colors.canvas-soft-2}` 95% (occasional inset region), `{colors.primary}` (the deep ink-near-black used as the polarity-flipped band when a section needs the dark mode treatment). Shadows are exceptionally subtle — every elevated card carries a stacked shadow built from `0px 1px 1px #00000005` + `0px 2px 2px #0000000a` + an inset border. Cards never float on heavy drop-shadow; they sit on the page held by hairline + soft glow.

borders.label: 边框 6 - Border 6
borders.description: Surfaces use a four-step ladder: `{colors.canvas}` (pure white for cards), `{colors.canvas-soft}` 98% (the page body), `{colors.canvas-soft-2}` 95% (occasional inset region), `{colors.primary}` (the deep ink-near-black used as the polarity-flipped band when a section needs the dark mode treatment). Shadows are exceptionally subtle — every elevated card carries a stacked shadow built from `0px 1px 1px #00000005` + `0px 2px 2px #0000000a` + an inset border. Cards never float on heavy drop-shadow; they sit on the page held by hairline + soft glow.

panels.title: 开发工具界面
panels.body: 适合工作台、文档、控制台和开发者产品。

panels.title: 颜色与字体可复用
panels.body: 页面从本地 metadata 与 Design.md 提取 palette、typography 和标签，用于快速预览主题质感。

panels.title: 面向真实界面片段
panels.body: 按钮、输入、卡片和间距样例保持克制，便于比较不同主题的系统性差异。

do: 建议：Reserve {colors.primary} ({#171717}) for primary CTAs across the page. Black ink IS the conversion target。
建议：Use {rounded.pill} 100 px for every marketing-scale CTA and {rounded.sm} 6 px for nav-scale buttons. The two pill scales coexist deliberately。
建议：Set every headline in {typography.display-*} weight 600, sentence-case, often period-terminated. Aggressive negative tracking is part of the voice。
建议：Use the brand mesh gradient as atmospheric decoration at hero scale only — never miniaturise it to an icon, never reduce to a single colour。
建议：Layer stacked shadows (multiple small offsets with inset hairline) rather than single heavy drops. The brand's elevation is calmer than Material。
dont: 避免：introduce a sixth accent colour. The brand operates with ink + gray + the four-pair gradient palette; new accents flatten the voice。
避免：render headlines in all-caps. Sentence-case + negative tracking is non-negotiable。
避免：drop a single heavy drop-shadow on cards. The brand's elevation is built from stacked small offsets + inset hairline rings。
避免：render the brand gradient at icon scale or in a single-colour reduced form. The gradient lives at hero scale only。
避免：promote the geometric sans to weight 700. The brand's display ceiling is 600。
